meta.title: Cautionary Lessons from Canada’s Spectrum Policy: Canada’s Pursuit of Wireless Competition through E
meta.description: Paul Beaudry and Harold Furchtgott-Roth discuss Canada’s attempts to promote wireless competition through exclusionary spectrum auction rules.
